title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, stream, and pull models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model manager, RAG, multi-user).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Retrieval-Augmented Generation template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension powered by Ollama models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI wrapper for Ollama with REPL and prompt templates.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats via Ollama models.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate, refactor and chat with code using Ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that answers questions using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app exposing REST endpoints to chat with Ollama models.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate for Ollama with async client and SSE streaming.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama supporting chat, embeddings and model management.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to summarize notes and answer questions via Ollama.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Lightweight Telegram bot that proxies requests to a local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Streamlit chatbot template with PDF upload, ChromaDB and Ollama embeddings.
